---
title: "TRUEFAM Welfare — GA4 Web Analytics"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import sys, os
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import date, datetime, timedelta

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(os.path.abspath("")).resolve()))
sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(os.path.abspath("")).resolve().parent / "reports"))

from ga4_connection import (
    _ga4_available, get_headline_kpis, get_traffic_by_channel,
    get_traffic_over_time, get_top_pages, get_geo_data,
    get_device_data, get_demographics, get_funnel_data,
    DEFAULT_START, DEFAULT_END,
)
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import display, HTML

now = datetime.now().strftime("%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p")
period_start = datetime.fromisoformat(DEFAULT_START).strftime("%b %d, %Y")
period_end = datetime.fromisoformat(DEFAULT_END).strftime("%b %d, %Y")
ga4_live = _ga4_available()

# ── Fetch all data ──
kpis = get_headline_kpis()
channels = get_traffic_by_channel()
daily_traffic = get_traffic_over_time()
top_pages = get_top_pages()
geo = get_geo_data()
devices = get_device_data()
demographics = get_demographics()
funnel = get_funnel_data()
```

```{python}
#| label: styles
#| echo: false

display(HTML("""
<style>
body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",sans-serif;background:#f5f4f0;color:#1a1a2e;font-size:14px}
.ga4-page{max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;padding:24px 16px}
.ga4-topbar{background:#0f172a;border-radius:14px;padding:16px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:20px}
.ga4-topbar-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.ga4-topbar-title{color:#fff;font-size:16px;font-weight:600}
.ga4-topbar-sub{color:#E8A020;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;font-weight:500}
.ga4-badge{padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#fff}
.ga4-badge-live{background:#1D9E75}
.ga4-badge-demo{background:#E8A020}
.ga4-meta{text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:#aaa;margin-bottom:20px;line-height:1.6}
.ga4-meta a{color:#1D9E75;text-decoration:none}
.ga4-section{margin-bottom:24px}
.ga4-section-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#999;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.8px;margin-bottom:10px;padding-left:2px}
.ga4-kpi-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px}
.ga4-kpi{background:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px;border:0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.07);position:relative}
.ga4-kpi-dot{position:absolute;top:12px;right:12px;width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%}
.ga4-kpi-label{font-size:10px;color:#999;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;margin-bottom:5px;line-height:1.3}
.ga4-kpi-value{font-size:22px;font-weight:600;color:#1a3a5c;line-height:1}
.ga4-kpi-sub{font-size:10px;color:#bbb;margin-top:4px}
.ga4-card{background:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:16px;border:0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.07);margin-bottom:12px}
.ga4-card-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#1a3a5c;margin-bottom:12px}
.ga4-card-sub{font-size:11px;color:#aaa;font-weight:400;margin-left:6px}
.ga4-stat-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:7px 0;border-bottom:0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);font-size:12px}
.ga4-stat-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.ga4-stat-label{color:#888;flex:1}
.ga4-stat-value{font-weight:600;color:#1a3a5c;flex-shrink:0}
.ga4-bar-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px}
.ga4-bar-label{width:100px;font-size:11px;color:#888;text-align:right;flex-shrink:0;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.ga4-bar-wrap{flex:1;height:18px;background:#f4f4f2;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden}
.ga4-bar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:4px;min-width:2px}
.ga4-bar-val{width:40px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#1a3a5c;flex-shrink:0}
.ga4-funnel-step{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:10px 0;border-bottom:0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06)}
.ga4-funnel-step:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.ga4-funnel-num{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:#1a3a5c;color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;flex-shrink:0}
.ga4-funnel-info{flex:1}
.ga4-funnel-label{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:#1a3a5c}
.ga4-funnel-bar{height:8px;background:#f4f4f2;border-radius:4px;margin-top:4px;overflow:hidden}
.ga4-funnel-bar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:4px;background:#1D9E75}
.ga4-funnel-count{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#1a3a5c;flex-shrink:0;width:50px;text-align:right}
.ga4-funnel-rate{font-size:10px;color:#888;text-align:right;width:50px;flex-shrink:0}
.ga4-donut-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px}
.ga4-donut-legs{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;flex:1}
.ga4-donut-leg{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:12px;color:#888}
.ga4-leg-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:2px;flex-shrink:0}
.ga4-empty{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:80px;font-size:12px;color:#ccc;font-style:italic}
.ga4-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:20px;font-size:11px;font-weight:500}
.ga4-pill-green{background:#E1F5EE;color:#0F6E56}
.ga4-pill-amber{background:#FAEEDA;color:#854F0B}
.ga4-pill-red{background:#FCEBEB;color:#A32D2D}
.ga4-two-col{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px}
.ga4-footer{text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:#bbb;margin-top:16px;padding-bottom:8px;line-height:1.8}
.ga4-footer a{color:#1D9E75;text-decoration:none}
.ga4-pending-banner{background:#FAEEDA;border:1px solid #E8A020;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 16px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:16px}
.ga4-pending-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#854F0B;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.8px;margin-bottom:3px}
.ga4-pending-body{font-size:11px;color:#a07020;line-height:1.5}
#quarto-header,.quarto-title-block{display:none}
@media(max-width:640px){.ga4-two-col{grid-template-columns:1fr}.ga4-kpi-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
</style>
"""))
```

```{python}
#| label: report
#| echo: false

COLORS = ["#378ADD", "#1D9E75", "#EF9F27", "#E24B4A", "#534AB7", "#EC4899", "#06B6D4", "#84CC16"]

def fmt_num(n):
    if isinstance(n, float):
        if n > 100:
            return f"{n:,.0f}"
        return f"{n:.1f}"
    return f"{int(n):,}" if n else "0"

def fmt_pct(n):
    return f"{float(n)*100:.1f}%" if n else "0.0%"

def fmt_dur(seconds):
    s = float(seconds)
    if s < 60:
        return f"{s:.0f}s"
    m = int(s // 60)
    sec = int(s % 60)
    return f"{m}m {sec}s"

# ── Status badge ──
badge_class = "ga4-badge-live" if ga4_live else "ga4-badge-demo"
badge_text = "Live" if ga4_live else "Awaiting GA4 Setup"

html = f"""
<div class="ga4-page">

  <div class="ga4-topbar">
    <div class="ga4-topbar-left">
      <img src="truefam-logo.png" alt="TRUEFAM" style="height:36px;">
      <div>
        <div class="ga4-topbar-title">Web Analytics Report</div>
        <div class="ga4-topbar-sub">GA4 &middot; TRUEFAMWEL.COM</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ga4-badge {badge_class}">{badge_text}</div>
  </div>

  <div class="ga4-meta">
    Reporting period: {period_start} &mdash; {period_end} &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Generated {now}<br>
    <a href="https://www.truefamwelfare.com" target="_blank">www.truefamwelfare.com</a>
  </div>
"""

# ── Pending banner if no GA4 ──
if not ga4_live:
    html += """
  <div class="ga4-pending-banner">
    <div class="ga4-pending-title">GA4 Configuration Pending</div>
    <div class="ga4-pending-body">This report is ready to pull live data. Configure GA4_PROPERTY_ID and GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS in .env to activate. All values below are placeholders.</div>
  </div>
"""

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 1 — Executive Snapshot
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
html += f"""
  <div class="ga4-section">
    <div class="ga4-section-title">1 &mdash; Executive Snapshot</div>
    <div class="ga4-kpi-grid">
      <div class="ga4-kpi"><div class="ga4-kpi-dot" style="background:#378ADD"></div><div class="ga4-kpi-label">Total Users</div><div class="ga4-kpi-value">{fmt_num(kpis['totalUsers'])}</div><div class="ga4-kpi-sub">Last 28 days</div></div>
      <div class="ga4-kpi"><div class="ga4-kpi-dot" style="background:#1D9E75"></div><div class="ga4-kpi-label">New Users</div><div class="ga4-kpi-value">{fmt_num(kpis['newUsers'])}</div><div class="ga4-kpi-sub">First-time visitors</div></div>
      <div class="ga4-kpi"><div class="ga4-kpi-dot" style="background:#534AB7"></div><div class="ga4-kpi-label">Sessions</div><div class="ga4-kpi-value">{fmt_num(kpis['sessions'])}</div><div class="ga4-kpi-sub">Total visits</div></div>
      <div class="ga4-kpi"><div class="ga4-kpi-dot" style="background:#EF9F27"></div><div class="ga4-kpi-label">Avg. Session</div><div class="ga4-kpi-value">{fmt_dur(kpis['averageSessionDuration'])}</div><div class="ga4-kpi-sub">Engagement time</div></div>
      <div class="ga4-kpi"><div class="ga4-kpi-dot" style="background:#E24B4A"></div><div class="ga4-kpi-label">Bounce Rate</div><div class="ga4-kpi-value">{fmt_pct(kpis['bounceRate'])}</div><div class="ga4-kpi-sub">Single-page visits</div></div>
      <div class="ga4-kpi"><div class="ga4-kpi-dot" style="background:#EC4899"></div><div class="ga4-kpi-label">Engagement Rate</div><div class="ga4-kpi-value">{fmt_pct(kpis['engagementRate'])}</div><div class="ga4-kpi-sub">10s+ or 2+ pages</div></div>
      <div class="ga4-kpi"><div class="ga4-kpi-dot" style="background:#06B6D4"></div><div class="ga4-kpi-label">Page Views</div><div class="ga4-kpi-value">{fmt_num(kpis['screenPageViews'])}</div><div class="ga4-kpi-sub">Total pages viewed</div></div>
      <div class="ga4-kpi"><div class="ga4-kpi-dot" style="background:#84CC16"></div><div class="ga4-kpi-label">Conversions</div><div class="ga4-kpi-value">{fmt_num(kpis['conversions'])}</div><div class="ga4-kpi-sub">Key events</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
"""

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 2 — Traffic Acquisition
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
html += """
  <div class="ga4-section">
    <div class="ga4-section-title">2 &mdash; Traffic Acquisition</div>
"""

if channels.empty:
    html += """
    <div class="ga4-card">
      <div class="ga4-card-title">Sessions by Channel</div>
      <div class="ga4-empty">No channel data &mdash; GA4 configuration pending</div>
    </div>
"""
else:
    max_sessions = channels["sessions"].max() if not channels.empty else 1
    html += '    <div class="ga4-card"><div class="ga4-card-title">Sessions by Channel</div>\n'
    for i, (_, row) in enumerate(channels.iterrows()):
        pct = (row["sessions"] / max_sessions * 100) if max_sessions > 0 else 0
        color = COLORS[i % len(COLORS)]
        html += f'      <div class="ga4-bar-row"><div class="ga4-bar-label">{row["sessionDefaultChannelGroup"]}</div><div class="ga4-bar-wrap"><div class="ga4-bar-fill" style="width:{pct:.0f}%;background:{color}"></div></div><div class="ga4-bar-val">{fmt_num(row["sessions"])}</div></div>\n'
    html += '    </div>\n'

html += '    <div class="ga4-card"><div class="ga4-card-title">Daily Sessions</div>'
if daily_traffic.empty:
    html += '<div class="ga4-empty">No daily traffic data &mdash; GA4 configuration pending</div>'
else:
    html += '<div class="ga4-empty">Chart renders with live GA4 data</div>'
html += '</div>\n  </div>\n'

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 3 — Audience & Demographics
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
html += """
  <div class="ga4-section">
    <div class="ga4-section-title">3 &mdash; Audience &amp; Demographics</div>
    <div class="ga4-two-col">
"""

# Geography
html += '      <div class="ga4-card"><div class="ga4-card-title">Users by Country</div>\n'
if geo.empty:
    html += '        <div class="ga4-empty">No geographic data &mdash; GA4 configuration pending</div>\n'
else:
    max_geo = geo["totalUsers"].max() if not geo.empty else 1
    for i, (_, row) in enumerate(geo.head(8).iterrows()):
        pct = (row["totalUsers"] / max_geo * 100) if max_geo > 0 else 0
        color = COLORS[i % len(COLORS)]
        html += f'        <div class="ga4-bar-row"><div class="ga4-bar-label">{row["country"]}</div><div class="ga4-bar-wrap"><div class="ga4-bar-fill" style="width:{pct:.0f}%;background:{color}"></div></div><div class="ga4-bar-val">{fmt_num(row["totalUsers"])}</div></div>\n'
html += '      </div>\n'

# Devices
html += '      <div class="ga4-card"><div class="ga4-card-title">Device Breakdown</div>\n'
if devices.empty:
    html += '        <div class="ga4-empty">No device data &mdash; GA4 configuration pending</div>\n'
else:
    max_dev = devices["totalUsers"].max() if not devices.empty else 1
    for i, (_, row) in enumerate(devices.iterrows()):
        pct = (row["totalUsers"] / max_dev * 100) if max_dev > 0 else 0
        color = COLORS[i % len(COLORS)]
        html += f'        <div class="ga4-bar-row"><div class="ga4-bar-label">{row["deviceCategory"].capitalize()}</div><div class="ga4-bar-wrap"><div class="ga4-bar-fill" style="width:{pct:.0f}%;background:{color}"></div></div><div class="ga4-bar-val">{fmt_num(row["totalUsers"])}</div></div>\n'
html += '      </div>\n'

html += '    </div>\n'  # close two-col

# Age & Gender
html += '    <div class="ga4-two-col">\n'
age_df = demographics["age"]
gender_df = demographics["gender"]

html += '      <div class="ga4-card"><div class="ga4-card-title">Age Distribution</div>\n'
if age_df.empty:
    html += '        <div class="ga4-empty">No age data &mdash; requires Google Signals</div>\n'
else:
    max_age = age_df["totalUsers"].max() if not age_df.empty else 1
    for i, (_, row) in enumerate(age_df.iterrows()):
        pct = (row["totalUsers"] / max_age * 100) if max_age > 0 else 0
        html += f'        <div class="ga4-bar-row"><div class="ga4-bar-label">{row["userAgeBracket"]}</div><div class="ga4-bar-wrap"><div class="ga4-bar-fill" style="width:{pct:.0f}%;background:#534AB7"></div></div><div class="ga4-bar-val">{fmt_num(row["totalUsers"])}</div></div>\n'
html += '      </div>\n'

html += '      <div class="ga4-card"><div class="ga4-card-title">Gender</div>\n'
if gender_df.empty:
    html += '        <div class="ga4-empty">No gender data &mdash; requires Google Signals</div>\n'
else:
    max_gen = gender_df["totalUsers"].max() if not gender_df.empty else 1
    for i, (_, row) in enumerate(gender_df.iterrows()):
        pct = (row["totalUsers"] / max_gen * 100) if max_gen > 0 else 0
        color = COLORS[i % len(COLORS)]
        html += f'        <div class="ga4-bar-row"><div class="ga4-bar-label">{row["userGender"].capitalize()}</div><div class="ga4-bar-wrap"><div class="ga4-bar-fill" style="width:{pct:.0f}%;background:{color}"></div></div><div class="ga4-bar-val">{fmt_num(row["totalUsers"])}</div></div>\n'
html += '      </div>\n'
html += '    </div>\n  </div>\n'

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 4 — Engagement & Content Performance
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
html += """
  <div class="ga4-section">
    <div class="ga4-section-title">4 &mdash; Engagement &amp; Content Performance</div>
    <div class="ga4-card">
      <div class="ga4-card-title">Top Pages by Views</div>
"""

if top_pages.empty:
    html += '      <div class="ga4-empty">No page data &mdash; GA4 configuration pending</div>\n'
else:
    for _, row in top_pages.head(10).iterrows():
        path = row["pagePath"]
        title = row.get("pageTitle", path)
        views = fmt_num(row["screenPageViews"])
        eng = fmt_pct(row["engagementRate"])
        dur = fmt_dur(row["averageSessionDuration"])
        html += f"""      <div class="ga4-stat-row">
        <span class="ga4-stat-label" style="font-weight:500;color:#1a3a5c">{path}</span>
        <span style="font-size:11px;color:#888;margin-right:12px">{eng} eng.</span>
        <span class="ga4-stat-value">{views}</span>
      </div>\n"""

html += '    </div>\n  </div>\n'

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 5 — Enrollment Conversion Funnel
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
html += """
  <div class="ga4-section">
    <div class="ga4-section-title">5 &mdash; Enrollment Conversion Funnel</div>
    <div class="ga4-card">
"""

max_funnel = max((s["count"] for s in funnel), default=1) or 1
for step in funnel:
    pct = (step["count"] / max_funnel * 100) if max_funnel > 0 else 0
    rate_vs_prev = ""
    if step["step"] > 1 and funnel[step["step"]-2]["count"] > 0:
        r = step["count"] / funnel[step["step"]-2]["count"] * 100
        rate_vs_prev = f"{r:.0f}%"
    html += f"""      <div class="ga4-funnel-step">
        <div class="ga4-funnel-num">{step['step']}</div>
        <div class="ga4-funnel-info">
          <div class="ga4-funnel-label">{step['label']}</div>
          <div class="ga4-funnel-bar"><div class="ga4-funnel-bar-fill" style="width:{pct:.0f}%"></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="ga4-funnel-count">{fmt_num(step['count'])}</div>
        <div class="ga4-funnel-rate">{rate_vs_prev}</div>
      </div>\n"""

html += '    </div>\n  </div>\n'

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 6 — Period-over-Period Trends
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
html += """
  <div class="ga4-section">
    <div class="ga4-section-title">6 &mdash; Period-over-Period Trends</div>
    <div class="ga4-card">
      <div class="ga4-card-title">28-Day Comparison</div>
      <div class="ga4-stat-row"><span class="ga4-stat-label">Total Users</span><span class="ga4-stat-value">""" + fmt_num(kpis['totalUsers']) + """ <span style="font-size:10px;color:#bbb">vs prior period</span></span></div>
      <div class="ga4-stat-row"><span class="ga4-stat-label">Sessions</span><span class="ga4-stat-value">""" + fmt_num(kpis['sessions']) + """ <span style="font-size:10px;color:#bbb">vs prior period</span></span></div>
      <div class="ga4-stat-row"><span class="ga4-stat-label">Engagement Rate</span><span class="ga4-stat-value">""" + fmt_pct(kpis['engagementRate']) + """ <span style="font-size:10px;color:#bbb">vs prior period</span></span></div>
      <div class="ga4-stat-row"><span class="ga4-stat-label">Conversions</span><span class="ga4-stat-value">""" + fmt_num(kpis['conversions']) + """ <span style="font-size:10px;color:#bbb">vs prior period</span></span></div>
    </div>
"""

if not ga4_live:
    html += """
    <div class="ga4-card">
      <div class="ga4-card-title">Trend Charts</div>
      <div class="ga4-empty">Period-over-period charts will render with live GA4 data</div>
    </div>
"""

html += '  </div>\n'

# ── Footer ──
html += """
  <div class="ga4-footer">
    TRUEFAM Welfare &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp;
    <a href="https://www.truefamwelfare.com">www.truefamwelfare.com</a> &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp;
    Data source: Google Analytics 4<br>
    Report auto-generated &mdash; do not manually edit
  </div>

</div>
"""

display(HTML(html))
```
